leads.name: Aisha Morgan
leads.title: Founder
leads.bio: Runs a small e-commerce infrastructure startup focused on customer retention workflows.
leads.engagement_context: Liked a thread about AI-native customer intelligence for online stores.
leads.personalized_message:
Hi Aisha Morgan,

I came across your work at StackCart and thought you might be interested in ExampleAI.

E-commerce intelligence engine for growth teams - we built it to help e-commerce founders overcome manual store analysis.

Early feedback has been positive, with users reporting Turns store and customer signals into weekly GTM actions.

Check it out if it seems relevant: https://example.ai

Best,
[Your name]
